title: Copper measuring cups and spoons set,Includes 5 Copper Measuring Cups and 5 Measuring Spoons and Measure Ingredient Leveler and Rings（copper）
description:
About this item
✱✱HIGH QUALITY DURABLE AND STURDY : These copper measuring cups and spoons set are made of food grade STAINLESS STEEL, With a stain finish which means that will NEVER RUST! This measuring cups and spoons set is corrosion-resistant and rust-resistant, no harmful materials，not easy to mold，strong and durable.To protect the health of you and your family.
✱✱ALL SIZES EVERY KITCHEN NEEDS :This copper measuring cups and spoons set has 5 copper measuring cups A:1/4 cup, 1/3 cup, 1/2 cup, 3/4 cup, 1 cup; 5 copper measuring spoons:1/4 tsp, 1/2 tsp, 1 tsp, 1/2 tbsp, 1 tbsp,measure ingredient leveler and ,2 rings.
✱✱EASY USAGE AND STORAGE : Long and wide handles to allow even clumsy fingers to hold tight. Engraved easy read measurement markings on our copper plated measuring cups and spoons set will never rub off or fade.Conveniently nests inside one another design and two detachable rings allowing you to store them in any drawer, cabinet or cupboard.
✱✱SPECIAL DESIGN :The vintage copper color and drawing finish make our measuring spoons and cups stand out from others. The gorgeous and stylish look of this measuring set makes a perfect gift for wedding, holiday or housewarming parties.
✱✱ATTENTION : Hand Wash Only! Not suitable for dishwasher, it could damage the copper covering!simply hand wash then air dry. 100% satisfaction guarantee for risk-free shopping - If you have any problem about our products, just contact us any time you feel comfortable.
reviews_5s:
thick and beautifully glazed — not sure if it’s permanent or not but even chipped should look really good

only downside is you might call them a tad heavy but it beats thin and dentable aka made inaccuratethe color is perfect and its very good product .Beautiful home decorThese measuring cups and spoons come with all the sizes, not just standard onesLOVE so much better than plastic measuring cupsGreat cupsAbsolutely beautiful! Stunning! So pretty I’m using them as kitchen decor.Great products, has every measures ever needed and easy to readWedding giftThese are great measuring cups! They are a bit heavy and seem to be good quality and go through the dishwasher great.
reviews_1s: I am not impressed with these measuring spoons. The teaspoon's handle must've been attached with Elmer's glue, because it snapped right off the bowl of the spoon. Also, the handles are very soft and bend with almost no pressure.Pretty set, I'm returning due to it not being dishwasher safe. I should have read the description. Only one star because of it not being dishwasher safeNot bad but one star for bad advertising. Not as high quality as advertised. Copper “plated” seems to not be an accurate description. Looks more like a thin layer of copper craft paint. Brush strokes are clearly visible and coverage isn’t 100% I have silver showing on a lot of edges. Makes me wonder if these will break if dropped. I don’t have much confidence in the weld quality of the handles. Overall they’ll do the job but make no mistake. These aren’t high endI received the measuring cups, but no measuring spoons. Disappointing.They are nice to look at, but cannot recommend as they fell apart on the first wash before I could even use them. The soldering does not hold. Others are also loose.
